scripts.setup: python-engine/venv/bin/python -m pip install -r python-engine/requirements.txt && npm --prefix api install && npm --prefix dashboard install
scripts.dev: npm run api & npm run dashboard; wait
scripts.check: python-engine/venv/bin/python python-engine/db.py && npm --prefix api run build && npm --prefix dashboard run build
scripts.status: curl -s http://localhost:3001/health || echo 'API is NOT running. Run: npm run api'
